creator: philip@FreeBSD.org
text:
It looks like this one was greylisted by rspamd for 20 minutes and was mailed out around the same time as the comment on this PR.  It seems to have arrived to the list now.

022-07-28 06:26:10 #86438(rspamd_proxy) <40a900>; proxy; rspamd_task_write_log: id: <0e568c93-3ea8-a2fa-6851-bbc9843103b5@tsoft.com>, qid: <4LtgdY1GV4z3Lvm>, ip: 198.144.192.42, from: <yuri@FreeBSD.org>, (default: F (soft reject): [4.50/15.00] [VIOLATED_DIRECT_SPF(3.50){},SUBJECT_ENDS_QUESTION(1.00){},MIME_GOOD(-0.10){text/plain;},RCVD_NO_TLS_LAST(0.10){},ARC_NA(0.00){},ASN(0.00){asn:7961, ipnet:198.144.192.0/19, country:US;},DMARC_NA(0.00){freebsd.org;},FREEFALL_USER(0.00){yuri;},FROM_EQ_ENVFROM(0.00){},FROM_HAS_DN(0.00){},GREYLIST(0.00){greylisted;Thu, 28 Jul 2022 06:31:10 GMT;new record;},HAS_XAW(0.00){},MIME_TRACE(0.00){0:+;},MLMMJ_DEST(0.00){ports@freebsd.org;},PREVIOUSLY_DELIVERED(0.00){ports@freebsd.org;},RCPT_COUNT_ONE(0.00){1;},RCVD_COUNT_TWO(0.00){2;},RCVD_VIA_SMTP_AUTH(0.00){},R_DKIM_NA(0.00){},R_SPF_SOFTFAIL(0.00){~all;},TO_DN_EQ_ADDR_ALL(0.00){},TO_DOM_EQ_FROM_DOM(0.00){},TO_MATCH_ENVRCPT_ALL(0.00){}]), len: 944, time: 1016.510ms, dns req: 18, digest: <1513f594887eb6aa8e217e5973ccf202>, rcpts: <ports@freebsd.org>, mime_rcpts: <ports@freebsd.org>, forced: soft reject "Try again later"; score=nan (set by greylist)


If you relay mail from your yuri@freebsd.org address through smtp.freebsd.org, you should never hit this particular problem.  Check the committers guide for instructions.
